sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ مَعًا لِتَحْقِيقِ أَهْدَافِ الشَّرِكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Radnici rade zajedno kako bi ostvarili ciljeve kompanije.
sentences.translationEn: The employees work together to achieve the company's goals.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ كُلُّ فَرْدٍ زَمِيلَهُ فِي الْمَهَامِّ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki pojedinac pomaže svom kolegi u teškim zadacima.
sentences.translationEn: Each individual helps their colleague with difficult tasks.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ يَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ أَكْثَرَ سُهُولَةً وَمُتْعَةً.
sentences.translation: Saradnja čini posao lakšim i zabavnijim.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation makes work easier and more enjoyable.
